title: Tintel

{{Quote|The Promenade is one of the shorter races, consisting of only four legs: Dahvil to Ord Dorlass; Ord Dorlass to Tintel; Tintel to Azna; and Azna to Fodro.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Tintel''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] celestial body located in the [[Belasco sector/Legends|Belasco sector]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it served as one of the mid-race stopping points of the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]], a popular [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] racing route. The [[Racer/Legends|racer]] and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Siro Simito]] once participated in the race, during which he made a detour from the segment of the race's route connecting Tintel to the [[Azna system/Legends|Azna system]] in order to make a delivery for the Alliance on the astronomical object [[Fait d'Fait]].

==Description==
{{Quote|Luckily, this delivery is to Fait d'Fait, a system not far off the Tintel to Azna hyperspace route.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
Tintel was a celestial body<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Tintel system/Legends|Tintel system]], a part of the [[Belasco sector/Legends|Belasco sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on a [[Tintel–Azna hyperspace route|hyperlane]] that connected it to the [[Azna system/Legends|Azna system]]<ref name="CRO" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC" /> and lay at a distance of no more than seven [[Standard day/Legends|days']] [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel with a Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] from<ref name="CRO" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]]<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE Dorlass">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord Dorlass}}</ref> [[Ord Dorlass]].<ref name="CRO" />

==History==
{{Quote|When the other racers left Tintel, they were heading straight for Azna; but I'm heading for Fait d'Fait. As of Tintel, I was in fourth place—right behind Seeg.|Siro Simito, report on the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade|<ref name="CRO" />}}
[[File:Siro_Simito.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The pilot Siro Simito visited Tintel as part of the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade race.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Tintel served as the second of the three mid-race stopping points of the popular<ref name="CRO" /> [[Standard year/Legends|annual]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|284|Fodro}}</ref> [[Star Rally]] [[Star/Legends|interstellar]] racing route known as the [[Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade]]. At one point, the [[Racer/Legends|racer]] and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operative [[Siro Simito]] was tasked by the Alliance to deliver a data module from<ref name="CRO" /> the Outer Rim Territories<ref name="EAOC" /> celestial body [[Dahvil]] to a contact on<ref name="CRO" /> the Mid Rim<ref name="EAOC" /> astronomical object [[Fait d'Fait]] while participating in the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade. Simito intentionally decreased the hyperdrive efficiency of his [[Axe (starship)|starship]] on the first legs of the race's route so that he would not later make a suspicious delay on the segment of the route where the racer planned to make a detour to Fait d'Fait from the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting Tintel and the planet [[Azna]].<ref name="CRO" />

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] he reached Tintel, Simito was in fourth place, after his rival [[Seeg]]. From there, in contrast to the other racers who departed straight for Azna, the Rebel agent then diverted his [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|ship]] to Fait d'Fait to make his delivery. At some point by the time that shortly followed the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Rebel Alliance [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] included Simito's report, which mentioned the racer's visit to Tintel during the Dahvil-Fodro Hyperspace Promenade, in a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] detailing various Rebel operatives.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tintel was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Tintel [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square P-11.<ref name="TEA" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-06-XX -->''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}}
